title: FNAF: TAPE'S AND MUSIC DISC'S
description: A mod that adds FNAF Music Discs / Cassette Tape's that bring a bit more life into your game.
body:
This is a Mod that adds Music Discs / Cassette Tapes!


![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a5ab57ad78558cb0c2869cff0edcd863272b007.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb4806043291ce823dc2a511d1fdf99bcaaa0163.png)

![Disc Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39a8ee013a9305a10e384bffb6487d3b78d84628.png)

![Blank Disc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5f85b67506db0b6d8e57f3c09281507229d7ef1.png)

If you want to suggest a song pls join the discord and send a youtube link to the Suggestion Box and a custom Music Disc texture if you want.

FNAF Calls:
- FNAF 1 Calls

- FNAF 2 Calls

- FNAF 3 Calls

MUSIC Discs:
- "Five Nights at Freddys 1 Song"
- "Five More Nights"
- "Its Been So Long"
- "Another Five Nights"
- "Die In A Fire"
- "We Dont Bite"
- "Five Long Nights"
- "Welcome To Freddys"
- "Now Hiring At Freddys"
- "You Belong Here"
- "Join Us For A Bite"
- "The Finale"

And alot more with a total of 214 Music Disc's and more to come.
